MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against John Wong; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY JOANNA STOREY OF HASSARD BONNINGTON, LLP TEL NO. 415-288-9800 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against John Wong is DENIED without prejudice. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Peter VanZandt; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY JOANNA STOREY OF HASSARD BONNINGTON, LLP TEL NO. 415-288-9800 APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Nicholas Adams; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Peter VanZandt; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Luxor Cabs, Inc. To Compel Plaintiff John Wong To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff John Wong And His Attorneys Aroplex Law Firm
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Philip S. Ward of the law offices of Hassard Bonnington LLP (415.288.9800) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff John Wong To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff John Wong And His Attorneys Aroplex Law Firm is unopposed and is GRANTED. Monetary sanctions are imposed against plaintiff and counsel in the amount of $240, payable within 20 days of notice of entry. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Nicholas Adams To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Nicholas Adams And His Attorneys Aroplex Law Firm

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Philip S. Ward of the law offices of Hassard Bonnington LLP (415.288.9800) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Nicholas Adams To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Nicholas Adams And His Attorneys Aroplex Law Firm is unopposed and is GRANTED. Monetary sanctions are imposed against plaintiff and counsel in the amount of $240, payable within 20 days of notice of entry. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
